'''Kemplex Nine''' was an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[jump-station]] destroyed by the creation of the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] in [[3996 BBY]]. Prior to this, it was one of the only inhabited outposts in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]. During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] gave hints that he intended to attack Kemplex Nine, but it was merely a ruse to draw the Republic military away from his true target of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Later that year, Qel-Droma did decide to [[Battle of Kemplex Nine|attack]] Kemplex Nine, but this was meant to draw the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]/[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] task force into a trap. [[Aleema Keto]] and [[Crado]], onboard the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], devastated the station and lured the pursuing Republic fleet, led by the Jedi [[Dace Diath]],
[[Shoaneb Culu]] and [[Qrrrl Toq]] into the ten [[Star/Legends|stars]] of the [[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]]. When they were in position, Aleema activated the Sith weapon and inadvertently ignited all ten stars, utterly wiping out Kemplex Nine and the entire surrounding area of space.
